akitaDAOEscrow.desc: the named DAO escrow this contract routes fees to (name + app)

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO

posts.desc: All the posts on the network

votes.desc: Counters for each post to track votes

reactions.desc: Counters for each post to track reactions

meta.desc: The meta data for each user

refTypes.desc: Registered ref types (key = uint64 ID, value = name + external flag + schema)
